title: Add password protection to the admin panel

requirements.text: Add a password gate to the admin panel page. Before any admin content is rendered, display a centered password entry screen (matching the luxury Jade dark aesthetic) with a password input field and a 'Enter' button. The hardcoded password is 'Mrudani.jade.jyo.hem'. If the entered password matches, grant access to the full admin panel. If incorrect, display an error message. The authenticated state should persist for the current browser session (e.g., via React state or sessionStorage) so the user is not re-prompted on page refresh within the same session.

quotes: Please build it with the password "Mrudani.jade.jyo.hem"

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to the admin panel route shows a password entry screen before any admin content is visible.
Entering the correct password 'Mrudani.jade.jyo.hem' and submitting grants access to the full admin panel.
Entering an incorrect password displays a visible error message and does not grant access.
The password entry screen uses the Jade luxury dark aesthetic (charcoal background, gold accents, cream text).
Once authenticated within a session, the user is not re-prompted on page reload (sessionStorage persistence).
The password input masks the entered characters (type='password').

constraints: The hardcoded password must be exactly 'Mrudani.jade.jyo.hem'.
Password protection must gate the entire admin panel page, not individual elements.
Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Backend authentication or storing the password in the Motoko canister.
Changing any other pages or components outside the admin panel.
Multi-user role management or password change functionality.
